seoTitle: Merton vs Metcalfe East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Merton and Metcalfe East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Merton vs Metcalfe East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Merton and Metcalfe East.
heading: Merton vs Metcalfe East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Merton, Victoria and Metcalfe East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Merton has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Metcalfe East (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Merton or Metcalfe East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Merton has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Metcalfe East scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Merton scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Metcalfe East scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Merton or Metcalfe East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Merton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
